channel.title: bioinf on Entropy Decrease
channel.description: Recent content in bioinf on Entropy Decrease

item.title: bioinf常见的一些错误
item.description: biostar上的这篇文章总结了在生物信息学日常工作中容易犯的一些共性的错误： * forget to check both strands * generate random genomic sites without avoiding masked (NNN) gaps * confuse genome freezes and even species * try to see which headers it contained
